title: A tall blue form with a precise void running through its center — the same compositional idea as 20-ruled-tile (solid material, dark void at center) rendered in portrait format with a different palette. The conceptual idea is identical: the void as the structural rule.
conceptualBridge: The ruled void means Precept's law is structural because the governing gap runs the full depth of the governed form, but this composition is materially identical to 20-ruled-tile.
decision: Rejected as a near-duplicate of 20-ruled-tile: the same void-through-solid composition in different proportions and palette does not constitute a materially distinct candidate.
